role: Directory contains language-specific configuration files for defining pattern-based extraction rules for code structure analysis.
responsibility: These configurations collectively enable the ArchSpine system to parse and extract imports, exports, and usages from source code across multiple languages, driving automatic code analysis and documentation generation.

children.role: Defines pattern-based extraction rules for code structure analysis in the ArchSpine mirror system.
Configuration specification for code symbol extraction rules used by the ArchSpine mirror system.
Defines extraction and mapping rules for ArchSpine's mirror system to parse Go source code and identify semantic elements.
Define structural patterns for code analysis in the ArchSpine mirror system
Define pattern-based rules for identifying imports, exports, and usages in Python code within the ArchSpine mirror system.
Define extraction patterns for code elements in ArchSpine's mirror system
Configuration for code pattern recognition in static analysis
